result.stderr:
deget 1.0.2
Copyright Alim Ozdemir (lyzerk)

  -p, --partition         (Default: 0) Set partition count. Default zero means 
                          system's processor count

  -o, --output            Default value is current folder that command runs.

  -r, --override          (Default: false) Override the lastest download file 
                          with same name. Otherwise it will download the file 
                          with numbers (e.g. File (1).exe, File (2).exe).

  -b, --buffersize        (Default: 8192) Set buffer size.

  -t, --timeout           (Default: 10000) Set timeout parameter in 
                          miliseconds.

  -d, --downloadFolder    (Default: false) The file download location set to 
                          User's download folder.

  -s, --startover         (Default: false) Startover the download

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

  value pos. 0            Required. Link to download

options.description: The file download location set to User's download folder.
Default value is current folder that command runs.
Override the lastest download file with same name. Otherwise it will download the file with numbers (e.g. File (1).exe, File (2).exe).
Set partition count. Default zero means system's processor count
